title: MMALS G2 Claim Manifest
description: Machine-readable evidence manifest mapping every load-bearing claim in a G2 document to its evidence status, supporting estimators, and release-gate dependencies. Designed for Phase P0 (provenance freeze) onward.

manifest_version.description: Semver of this manifest schema instance, independent of the paper version.

commit_hash.description: Git commit of the source repo at freeze time.

estimators.description: Registry of named estimators referenced by claims (e.g. route-function alignment estimators).

target_quantity.description: What the estimator claims to measure, e.g. route-function alignment, retention delta.

reference_oracle.description: Controlled-data oracle used to qualify this estimator, if any.

calibration_split_id.description: Which data split calibrated this estimator. Must differ from qualification_split_id.

selected_for_elegance_only.description: Must be false. Flag exists so reviewers can explicitly check it was considered and rejected as a selection criterion.

gates.description: Registry of release gates R0-R9. Thresholds must be frozen before the phase that could be evaluated against them runs (see phases[].uses_gate).

threshold_frozen.description: True only if the threshold was fixed before any qualification-split evidence was seen.

consequence_if_failed.description: Claim-level downgrade permitted on failure, per Section 16.4, e.g. 'soft advisory gate only, no hard-admissibility claim'.

uses_gates.description: Gate IDs this phase evaluates against or must not contaminate.

contamination_check.description: Explicit statement that consumes_split_ids for this phase are disjoint from any split used in an earlier estimator-selection phase. Required for any phase feeding a gate in 'gates'.

text.description: The claim in paraphrased/normalized form, not necessarily verbatim.

status.description: established = supported by prior qualified work (e.g. G1, cited literature). g1-qualified = passed the G1 evidence ladder. g2-candidate = hypothesis with a defined falsification test but no passing evidence yet. deferred = explicitly out of scope until a prerequisite gate/phase passes.

falsification_test.description: Required for g2-candidate claims. What observation would falsify this claim.

external_publication_eligible.description: False by default for g2-candidate and deferred claims.
